Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Derek St. Pierre, Esq., and Gabrio Navri, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, STEPHEN M. WILLIAMS, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendant TAMERA BRIONES,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Invoices from Plaintiff's Office (4 pages)

Court returned exhibit to Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $12,201.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1791.22
Attorney's Fees: $10,025.00
Costs: $750.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,067.22

Judgment signed in open court.
